name: loom
description: A Codex adapter for Loom that routes explicit @loom commands through the local delivery control CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Route @loom commands through the local delivery control CLI.
interface.longDescription: Loom is an agent-neutral delivery control layer. This plugin is the Codex adapter: it routes explicit @loom commands through the local Loom CLI with the Codex agent profile, using delivery-scoped state, Brainstorm confirmation, structured contract requests, task execution requests, review, repair, and continue routing.
